info.title: Sema — coherence-kernel plugin
info.description: The rented-mind door into the coherence-kernel body: grounded answers, frequency attunement, and full change-graph traceability. Served natively by the c-bootstrapped fkwu kernel running plugin/chatgpt-plugin.fk — no Python, no Node behind this API.

servers.description: The live door: fkwu serving natively behind Cloudflare TLS on the Coherence-Network VPS (https://hati.earth/sema serves identically; http://localhost:8787 for a local run)

get.summary: Ask the body: grounded cells, a frequency read with attunement, and trace links
get.description: Returns the body cells that ground the question (or an honest miss), the fear<->love frequency read with attunement for the answering voice, the stance (trust over fear judged, sovereignty, vitality), and trace links: receipt, per-cell change graph, line attribution.

get.summary: The receipt in a link: a cell's change graph and attribution
get.description: For any path in the body, returns the links that guide exploration of the change graph: the living cell, every commit that shaped it, line-level attribution, and the dated receipts ledger.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Repo-relative path of a cell, e.g. ingest/judged-trust.fk

change_graph.description: Link to every commit that shaped this cell.

spectrum.description: Intensity-weighted valence; positive is the love/coherence band, negative the fear band, 'unread' when no seed word carried a charge.

attune.description: How the answering voice should meet this frequency.

grounded_status.description: grounded:hit or grounded:miss with the honest instruction either way.
